/usr/bin/c++ -O3 -DNDEBUG -Wl,--dependency-file=CMakeFiles/chronos_tests.dir/link.d CMakeFiles/chronos_tests.dir/test_main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/chronos_tests.dir/test_simhash.cpp.o CMakeFiles/chronos_tests.dir/test_codex_alias.cpp.o CMakeFiles/chronos_tests.dir/test_mmr.cpp.o CMakeFiles/chronos_tests.dir/test_oracle_harness.cpp.o -o chronos_tests   -L/home/zer0/.local/lib  -Wl,-rpath,/home/zer0/CHRONO/build:/home/zer0/CHRONO/build/_deps/libgit2-build:/home/zer0/.local/lib ../libchronos_core.so -lsqlite3 ../_deps/libgit2-build/libgit2.so.1.8.1 /usr/lib/libpcre.so /usr/lib/libz.so -lrt /usr/lib/libtree-sitter.so -ltree-sitter-cpp /usr/lib/libtree-sitter.so -ltree-sitter-cpp -ltree-sitter-python
